Vega.note: Alpha Lyrae · Brightest star in Lyra · 5th brightest in night sky · Namesake of this startpage

Deneb.note: Alpha Cygni · Tail of the Swan · One of the most luminous stars known · 100,000× solar luminosity

Altair.note: Alpha Aquilae · Eagle star · 12th brightest overall · Rotates once every 8.9 hours
